name: Fresh Lending Group
description_short: Fresh Lending Group is a Chicago-based private lender specializing in real estate investment financing, offering fix-and-flip loans, rental property mortgages, and construction financing with rates starting at 3.49%.
description_long:
Fresh Lending Group was established in Chicago, Illinois in 2016 as a collective of private investors and equity funds focused on funding real estate investment opportunities throughout the Chicago area. The company has completed 1,758 projects and appointed 870 contractors, positioning itself as an active player in the local real estate lending market.

The company offers multiple financing products tailored to real estate investors: Fix & Flip loans for short-term purchase and rehabilitation financing (rates starting 6.49%, up to 90-100% of purchase price plus 100% of rehab costs), Rental Loans for long-term income-producing properties (rates starting 3.49%), New Construction financing for both first-time and experienced builders (rates starting 4.99%), Lines of Credit, Refinances, and Commercial Real Estate loans. All loan products emphasize fast closing (7-20 days depending on product type).

Fresh Lending Group distinguishes itself through its emphasis on quick turnaround times, high loan-to-value ratios for fix-and-flip projects, and a stated commitment to personalized one-on-one client relationships. The company operates as a private lender rather than a traditional bank, which allows for more flexible underwriting criteria typically required for non-owner occupied investment properties.

As a private lender specializing exclusively in real estate investment properties (non-owner occupied), Fresh Lending Group is not suitable for primary residence mortgages or conventional homebuyers. Borrowers should expect higher rates compared to traditional mortgage lenders and should verify licensing, regulatory status, and specific terms before committing, as private lenders operate under different regulatory frameworks than federally-chartered banks.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fast closing timeline of 7-10 days for fix-and-flip and rental loans, 10-20 days for construction
High LTV options: up to 90-100% of purchase price plus 100% of rehabilitation costs for fix-and-flip loans
Competitive rates for private lending: 3.49% for rental loans, 4.99% for construction, 6.49% for fix-and-flip
Comprehensive product suite including fix-and-flip, rental loans, construction, lines of credit, and commercial financing
Established track record with 1,758 completed projects and 870 appointed contractors since 2016
Multiple financing options for different real estate investment strategies (short-term rehab vs. long-term rental income)
Local Chicago presence with direct phone and in-person contact options
cons: Private lender status means less regulatory oversight and consumer protections compared to federally-chartered banks
Limited geographic focus (primarily Chicago-based) may restrict availability for out-of-state investors
Rates are significantly higher than traditional mortgage lenders (3.49%-6.49% for private lending vs. conventional mortgages)
No information provided about specific underwriting criteria, fees, prepayment penalties, or loan terms and conditions
Only serves real estate investors; cannot assist primary residence homebuyers or owner-occupied properties
best_for: Real estate fix-and-flip investors seeking short-term acquisition and rehabilitation financing
Rental property investors looking for long-term financing on non-owner occupied investment properties
New construction developers and first-time builders needing ground-up development financing
Chicago-area real estate investors requiring fast closing and flexible private lending terms
diagnosis: Fresh Lending Group is best for experienced real estate investors and fix-and-flip operators in the Chicago area seeking private lending with fast closing times and high LTV ratios. The main caveat is that this is a private lender serving only non-owner occupied investment properties, not a traditional mortgage lender—borrowers will face higher rates and should carefully verify licensing, specific terms, and regulatory status before proceeding.
services: Fix & Flip loans for purchase and rehabilitation of non-owner occupied properties
Rental Loans for long-term financing of income-producing investment properties
New Construction and Ground-Up Development financing
Lines of Credit for real estate investors
Any other real estate investment property financing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
